en.title: Article Continued
en.prompt: Continue writing an article about [theme] that begins with the following sentence: [opening sentence to continue]
en.remark: Complete the essay by continuing the opening section of the essay according to its theme.

related.title: Writing assistant
related.remark: For optimising the grammar, clarity and conciseness of text and improving readability.

related.title: Nature Style Editing
related.remark: Polish according to the style of Nature, or provide a writing style to emulate. Contributed by @Pfyuan77.

metaTitle: Article Completer: Finish Your Story Flow
metaDescription: Stuck on an opening line? Give a theme and start, and AI continues your article seamlessly so you can finish the draft.

faq.q: The continuation does not match the opening in style, what can I do?
faq.a: In the placeholder, explicitly note "strictly preserve the tone, point of view, and sentence rhythm of the opening paragraph," and provide one or two style anchor sentences. GPT defaults to its own comfortable written style and will drift into a different voice if you do not lock it down.

faq.q: Can I make it continue to a fixed word count or chapter structure?
faq.a: Yes. Append concrete requirements like "continue for 800 words, split into 3 subsections, each with its own subheading." Without numbers the AI improvises freely and might wrap up after 300 words or spin off into something off-topic.
